nasb.text: You made men ride over our heads; We went through fire and through water, Yet You brought us out into a place of abundance.

esv.text: you let men ride over our heads; we went through fire and through water; yet you have brought us out to a place of abundance.

cnv.text: 你使人駕車軋我們的頭， 我們經過水火， 你卻把我們領到豐盛之地。

ccb.text: 你让别人骑在我们的头上。 我们曾经历水火， 但你带我们到达丰盛之地。

csbs.text: 你使人骑在我们的头上； 我们曾进入烈火、进入众水， 但你又把我们领出来，到那福份满溢之地。
